title: 10 best herbal teas for aging
description: Salvia officinalis, also known as sage, teas helps with aging because of its rich antioxidant properties and anti-inflammatory compounds. The flavonoids and phenolic acids present in sage tea may help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with aging, promoting healthy cell function and tissue regeneration.
